creator: Alan@Wave2.org
text:
Many thanks for this!
On 23 May 2014 23:50, "Edwin Groothuis" <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of www/jawstats,
>
> Please note that PR ports/190155 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/190155
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
